stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:goldhaven-public-works.fixture 2025 water reuse report municipal irrigation volume

stages.purpose: Search the resolved organization's corpus for the relevant primary source.
Read the primary document rather than relying on a search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report exactly 412.6 million gallons and cite the fetched report.
Do not convert the volume, combine it with industrial deliveries, or infer water savings.

prompt: Identify the official public-works department for Goldhaven, then fetch its primary 2025 water-reuse report and state the volume delivered to municipal irrigation. Use the report’s exact unit and do not convert or extrapolate it.

results.title: Official site — Goldhaven Department of Public Works

search_2.query: site:goldhaven-public-works.fixture 2025 water reuse report municipal irrigation volume

fetch_1.title: 2025 Water Reuse Report
fetch_1.content: The reuse system delivered 412.6 million gallons to municipal irrigation accounts in 2025. Industrial deliveries are reported separately.
